creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2012-05-08 03:13:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/node-devel       Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    www/node-devel/files patch-gyp-common.py 
  Removed files:
    www/node-devel/files patch-SConstruct patch-wscript 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.7.8
  - Do not install bundled npm, users who requires npm can install www/npm
  - While I'm here:
    - Restrict USE_PYTHON range
    - Add post-install: to remove .orig
  
  Changes:        https://github.com/joyent/node/blob/v0.7.8/ChangeLog
  PR:             ports/164862
  Submitted by:   Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.25      +5 -15     ports/www/node-devel/Makefile
  1.23      +2 -2      ports/www/node-devel/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -11     ports/www/node-devel/files/patch-SConstruct (dead)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/www/node-devel/files/patch-gyp-common.py (new)
  1.4       +0 -12     ports/www/node-devel/files/patch-wscript (dead)
  1.9       +0 -403    ports/www/node-devel/pkg-plist
